chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2618 - وَ رَوَى زُرَارَةُ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَمَّا يُكْرَهُ لِلْمُحْرِمِ أَنْ يَلْبَسَهُ فَقَالَ «يَلْبَسُ كُلَّ ثَوْبٍ إِلاَّ ثَوْباً وَاحِداً يَتَدَرَّعُهُ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2618 - Zurara narrated from one of the Imams (as), who said:
I asked him about what is disliked for a Muhrim to wear.
Imam (as) said: "He may wear any garment except a single garment worn like a tunic (tadarru’)."
